conversation.message_text: Cozy Earth: Reply Y to subscribe to recurring automated personalized marketing alerts (e.g. cart reminders) from Cozy Earth.
Cozy Earth: Welcome to Cozy Earth! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.

Cozy Earth: Happy Holidays! Congrats on your $30 Credit! Use code WEGSBlKy at checkout. This code applies only to orders over $75.

Hurry...offer expires in 48 hours!
https://cozyearth.attn.tv/a8Q1-UaNR-K-
Code doesn't work

Cozy Earth: I'm sorry to hear that! Do you mind sending me a screenshot of any error messages you see after trying out your code? You can also tell me what you want to get today so I can try on my end.
The code has upper and lower and I'm trying to follow it, is that an I i or 1 I've tried all
My photo won't deliver, it says enter a valid code. Is it WEGSBIKy
They y looks lower case but I've tried it both ways

Cozy Earth: I'm sorry for any inconvenience this has caused having trouble applying the promo code. That's the letter "I," and only the letter "y" is lowercase; the rest are uppercase. 

To use this code, your order total needs to be $75 or more. If you have any other questions or need further assistance, feel free to let me know. I'm here to help!

important: There is a scam website that customers are texting in from (https://heydudestores.com/)
If you notice this, reroute customers to the correct website!
send_to_cs: Don't ESC post-purchase issues, use PPI shortcut
templates: For wrong items received use WMP shortcut
For damaged items received use DMI shortcut
For order status requests use OSR shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: The welcome code is valid for first-time customers only.
➜ Can't be combined with any other discounts or offers, including sale styles
➜  Use cww temp for code issues
The promotional price shown on the Heydude website may not always be guaranteed when cx is redirected to Prime for purchase if the item is out of stock

send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items

When will it be arriving?
Fashion Nova: I'm really sorry for the trouble! Upon checking, your order is still in transit. Your order can take up to 7 business days to arrive, so it's still within the shipping timeframe.

I just received package where one item is stained with make up and has been used and another one has the mesh that is discolored in a few spots. What about a product that didn't arrive in the package? 

I'm hoping you guys won't charge me for a return or an exchange. Shipping should be free to take back.
Why were there so many complications in this order?

Fashion Nova: I'm really sorry about this, and surely, this isn't the experience I want you to have. I understand how frustrating this situation must be. This will be best handled by visiting http://sms.fashionnova.com/al4hBDim2911 and beginning an inquiry with our team by selecting the "Help with my order" option. Our team is happy to help!
I would like to speak to a representative please may I have a customer service number?

I tried the link and it goes through a series of questions and asked me if I've access to my email or phone number and then I click yes and it tells me account is not found

I'm starting to see that you guys have created a system to make it nearly impossible for the client to ever be satisfied. I've made three orders in one month and every single time you guys have made sure that I've lost in someway. You will not pay for return even though the return is really your fault because you sent out faulty and use merchandise.

promotions.title: Promo Exclusions
content:
• Can't be applied to bundles

• Codes can be applied on sale items but are not valid during sitewide sales

browsingHistory.item: TechBlend Field Jacket - METEORITE BLACK / XS

send_to_cs: Send to CS for coupon code requests
escalate: Always include the cx name & email in your ESC notes
ESC to confirm accurate product measurements for the cx
ESC immediately if the cx mentions the code EMPLOYEE50
dos_and_donts: They don't offer callbacks, don't suggest this to cx
promo_and_exclusions: SuperCircle Credits can be used at any time on any items (regular, discounted/on sale) and even during sitewide sales
SuperCircle Credits can't be combined with another discount code at the same time
Customers can apply discount codes to items that are on sale if its a discount code specific to the sale.

conversation.message_text: tentree: Reply Y to subscribe to recurring automated personalized marketing alerts (e.g. cart reminders) from tentree.
tentree: Welcome! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel. Privacy: attnl.tv/p/wGm
tentree: Hey this is Jordan , how can I help you?
I want to Order for Christmas a jacket that states final sale. If it doesn't fit can it be returned or exchanged?
Template used: "Final Sale"; last updated: 2023-09-18 15:33:25.451
Template used: "Return Policy"; last updated: 2023-09-18 15:28:38.085

tentree: Appreciate your interest, and yes, you're correct! All final sale items are not applicable for returns or exchanges as specified on the product pages, in your order summary before checkout, and in your order confirmation email after purchase. Let me know if you have other questions, I'd be glad to help!

tone: Let the customer have the last word!
dos_and_donts: Don't reply to messages like "ok", "thanks", etc
promo_and_exclusions: ➜ Cannot be used for new products!
➜ Recommend to cx to take advantage of the Gift With Purchase (found on the Offers page) with new products so they can get a deal
Check their offers page for up-to-date info on codes & offers
If cx asks about a code that isn't on this page, it's likely expired!
